metaCtxSchema/webWizziDocs/t/params/enum.contents:
{
    $params name
    name "${name}"
    type "string"
    kind "enum"
    $append extend
    [ enumValues
        $hook

metaCtxSchema/webWizziDocs/t/params/inte.contents:
{
    $params name, defaultValue:integer|-1
    name "${name}"
    type "integer"
    $if defaultValue == null
        defaultValue null
    $else
        defaultValue ${defaultValue}

metaCtxSchema/webWizziDocs/t/params/stri.contents:
{
    $params name, defaultValue|@@null
    name "${name}"
    type "string"
    $if defaultValue == null
        defaultValue null
    $else
        defaultValue "${defaultValue}"
    $hook

metaCtxSchema/webWizziDocs/t/params/use..contents:
{
    $params name, defaultValue:boolean|false
    name "use${_.capitalize(name)}"
    type "use"
    defaultValue "${defaultValue}"
    [ parameters
